<!-- 2. Go to Tools: Import in the WordPress admin panel. -->
<!-- 3. Install the "WordPress" importer from the list. -->
<!-- 4. Activate & Run Importer. -->

		<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Samsung Mobile Phone]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_5/</link>
		<pubDate>Mon, 20 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_5/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Zoom in close with 100X</li>
 	<li>Display :3200 x 1440 pixels</li>
 	<li>Your Cellphones usage</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Apple iPad Pro]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_7/</link>
		<pubDate>Sat, 18 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_7/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.


It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Portable Bluetooth Speakers</li>
 	<li>Equalizer Modes for Normal</li>
 	<li>Frequency Response 180Hz</li>

</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Samsung Gaming Monitor]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_8/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 17 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_8/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Android TV with DTS</li>
 	<li>LED Smart Google TV</li>
 	<li>WiFi Support, 2.5G Port</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Tesco Bluetooth Handsfree]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_10/</link>
		<pubDate>Wed, 15 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_10/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.


It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Surround Sound Pro</li>
 	<li>Memory Foam Ear Pads.</li>
 	<li>Portable Headphones</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.


It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Digital Camera Focus]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_12/</link>
		<pubDate>Mon, 13 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_12/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Portable USB Optical</li>
 	<li>Mice with USB Receiver</li>
 	<li>Type C Adapter</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.

It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>

		<title><![CDATA[Apple Watch Series 9]]></title>

		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_14/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.


It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[FOXBOX Smart Watch]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_15/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 10 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_15/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.


It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>SDSSDE61 1T00 G25</li>
 	<li>USB 3.2 Gen 2x2</li>
 	<li>External Solid State Drive</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<title><![CDATA[Tesco Wireless Speaker]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_16/</link>
		<pubDate>Thu, 09 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_16/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.


It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>

 	<li>Portable Bluetooth Speakers</li>
 	<li>Equalizer Modes for Normal</li>
 	<li>Frequency Response 180Hz</li>
 	<li></li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Xiaomi Mobile Phone]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_17/</link>
		<pubDate>Wed, 08 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_17/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Zoom in close with 100X</li>
 	<li>Display :3200 x 1440 pixels</li>
 	<li>Your Cellphones usage</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<title><![CDATA[Graphics Card Gaming]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_18/</link>
		<pubDate>Tue, 07 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_18/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>

</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Portable Bluetooth Speaker]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_19/</link>
		<pubDate>Mon, 06 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_19/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Pocket Size Portable</li>
 	<li>Equalizer Modes for Normal</li>
 	<li>Frequency Response 180Hz</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<title><![CDATA[Samsung Gaming Monitor]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_20/</link>
		<pubDate>Sun, 05 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_20/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.
 

It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>

</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Xbox One Controller]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_21/</link>
		<pubDate>Sat, 04 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_21/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Microphone and Headset Jack</li>
 	<li>Lithium Batteries Required</li>
 	<li>Fast Charging</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<title><![CDATA[Samsung Wireless Handphone]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_22/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 03 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_22/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>

</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Samsung Galaxy Tablet]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_23/</link>
		<pubDate>Thu, 02 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_23/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Zoom in close with 100X</li>
 	<li>Display :3200 x 1440 pixels</li>
 	<li>Your Cellphones usage</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. 					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Asus Wireless Router]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_6/</link>
		<pubDate>Sun, 19 Feb 2023 20:08:37 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://hex-wp.com/hexwp/?post_type=product&#038;p=9992</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.


It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Adaptive Port Forwarding</li>
 	<li>Band WiFi 6 Gaming</li>
 	<li>WiFi support, 2.5G Port</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Onikom Special Headset]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_1/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 24 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_1/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Surround Sound Pro</li>
 	<li>Memory Foam Ear Pads.</li>
 	<li>Portable Headphones</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Asus 15.6 Inch Laptop]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_2/</link>
		<pubDate>Thu, 23 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_2/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>AMD Ryzen 5 5500U 6-core</li>
 	<li>Newest HP 15.6 inch FHD</li>
 	<li>Windows 11 S Ghost Manta</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[PS5 DualSense Gamepad]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_3/</link>
		<pubDate>Thu, 23 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_3/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.

It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Microphone and Headset</li>
 	<li>Lithium Batteries Required</li>
 	<li>Charging with Fast Charging</li>
</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<title><![CDATA[Bose S1 Pro Portable]]></title>
		<link>http://hex-wp.com/filson/product/product_4/</link>
		<pubDate>Tue, 21 Feb 2023 20:08:40 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sao-wp.ir/tecnoshop/product/product_4/</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[The Samsung S95B OLED is the best TV we've tested that's available in a 55-inch size. It's a premium TV that delivers fantastic overall picture quality and has a huge selection of smart features that are sure to please anyone. It's fantastic for gaming, thanks to its four HDMI 2.1 inputs, meaning you can take full advantage of the new-gen consoles, like the Xbox Series X and the PS5. The built-in Tizen OS is simple and easy to use and has a great selection of <a href="#">streaming</a> apps.



It's a fantastic choice for watching the latest HDR content in the dark. It has impressive peak brightness in HDR, delivering a bright, impactful image that respects the content creator's intent. Bright colors are much more vibrant and lifelike than on lower-end OLED TVs like the LG C2 OLED, and it also has an exceptionally wide color gamut, allowing it to display a much wider range of colors with certain content.]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[<ul class="list-description">
 	<li>Portable Bluetooth Speakers</li>
 	<li>Equalizer Modes for Normal</li>
 	<li>Frequency Response 180Hz</li>

</ul>]]></excerpt:encoded>
